message:
🐛 Fix 151 test failures: add missing agentFetch mock to shared module mocks (#11119)

The agentFetch export was added to hooks/mcp/shared.ts but test files
that mock this module did not include it. Vitest strict mock checking
throws when code under test tries to access the missing export.

Fix: Add agentFetch mock to all test files that mock hooks/mcp/shared.

Signed-off-by: clubanderson <clubanderson@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: clubanderson <clubanderson@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
